name: Bailey, Harold Leland
description: He is another one of our mid-year graduates. A practical man through and through and one on whom we can count to bring home the bacon. Would never disclose his middle name except on very special occasion. Was Prof. Forbes' right-hand man and spent most of his time in Mining Lab.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: He is another one of our mid-year graduates. A practical man through and through and one on whom we can count to bring home the bacon. Would never disclose his middle name except on very special occasion. Was Prof. Forbes' right-hand man and spent most of his time in Mining Lab.

name: Bloom, George Barnett
description: He graduated in December and fell for the army life. He just couldn't stay out of the clouds. He is now flying at Carlstrom Field in Florida. Bloom was here last summer and admitted that he enjoyed every minute of the time.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: He graduated in December and fell for the army life. He just couldn't stay out of the clouds. He is now flying at Carlstrom Field in Florida. Bloom was here last summer and admitted that he enjoyed every minute of the time.

name: Karl, William Booker
description: "Book" hails from Kansas City, but has tried to live that down by his work on the Miner Board. Is a hard and consistent worker. A real student and a strong supporter of all school activities. Has been known to visit Cuba with alarming regularity. Has no inclination to argue.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Book" hails from Kansas City, but has tried to live that down by his work on the Miner Board. Is a hard and consistent worker. A real student and a strong supporter of all school activities. Has been known to visit Cuba with alarming regularity. Has no inclination to argue.

name: Carroll, Preston Burford
description: No one seems to know just how he acquired the good old Spanish name of "Bobo," but Dame Rumor has it that he was a gun in Descrip. Is one of our most consistent and nonpartial fussers.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: No one seems to know just how he acquired the good old Spanish name of "Bobo," but Dame Rumor has it that he was a gun in Descrip. Is one of our most consistent and nonpartial fussers.

name: Arthur, L. Cairns
description: Buddy voluntarily incarcerated himself for life early in the Football season. Won his fourth letter in football in '20. Has some expectations of being a Met. Engr.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Buddy voluntarily incarcerated himself for life early in the Football season. Won his fourth letter in football in '20. Has some expectations of being a Met. Engr.

name: Kuang, Yu Chang
description: Chang hails from China, and therefore we are short of dope on his mental afflictions such as fussing. Nevertheless, he is a good student and a willing worker. We are inclined to believe from his actions that "Someone" is waiting for him.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Chang hails from China, and therefore we are short of dope on his mental afflictions such as fussing. Nevertheless, he is a good student and a willing worker. We are inclined to believe from his actions that "Someone" is waiting for him.

name: Colbert, Jules Philip
description: "Jules Philip" has all the qualifications of a Prof. and takes especial delight in showing the Vocates that they don't know much about Trigonometry and Algebra. Armsby's right-hand man.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Jules Philip" has all the qualifications of a Prof. and takes especial delight in showing the Vocates that they don't know much about Trigonometry and Algebra. Armsby's right-hand man.

name: Cornwell, Benjamin S.
description: "Bennie" was in the navy, but he had a friend who was a pilot in the Cavalry. As a "fusser" we can't hand him much, but that is the girls' hard luck and not his.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Bennie" was in the navy, but he had a friend who was a pilot in the Cavalry. As a "fusser" we can't hand him much, but that is the girls' hard luck and not his.

name: Crow, Wayman
description: Crow spent some few years in the army and returned to school in 1919. He has been working under "Boots" since he came back and is now quite a metallurgist and well known as an Electrical Engineer.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Crow spent some few years in the army and returned to school in 1919. He has been working under "Boots" since he came back and is now quite a metallurgist and well known as an Electrical Engineer.

name: Davidson, Lewis Ely
description: Will probably be a geologist. Spent last summer chasing "Ruby Doux" over the Ozarks. Says he found several excellent specimens, but can show no conclusive evidence. Metamorphically speaking, occurs locally in contact with Hurst and Bailey.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Will probably be a geologist. Spent last summer chasing "Ruby Doux" over the Ozarks. Says he found several excellent specimens, but can show no conclusive evidence. Metamorphically speaking, occurs locally in contact with Hurst and Bailey.

name: Delaloye, August Francis
description: "Gus" is an Ozark product and is generally seen in "Lights" with his pipe in one hand and a cue in the other. Sometimes he has been known to tote a book around. He is Bob Dickerson's chief flunky, and was never known to bother the skirts. Also an authority on "home brew."
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Gus" is an Ozark product and is generally seen in "Lights" with his pipe in one hand and a cue in the other. Sometimes he has been known to tote a book around. He is Bob Dickerson's chief flunky, and was never known to bother the skirts. Also an authority on "home brew."

name: Denison, William R.
description: Has a tendency toward the gentle art of fussing, especially within "The" family! Aspires to the position of county surveyor in 1945.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"Pride of the Ozarks."
Has a tendency toward the gentle art of fussing, especially within "The" family! Aspires to the position of county surveyor in 1945.

name: Fiedler, John R.
description: Fiedler returned to school after service in the army and several years of practical experience, but never allowed that to affect him as he got back into the "swim" very easily. Is one of the few in school this year who miss the good old days.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Fiedler returned to school after service in the army and several years of practical experience, but never allowed that to affect him as he got back into the "swim" very easily. Is one of the few in school this year who miss the good old days.

name: Fischlowitz, Victor K.
description: "Fish" hasn't left Rolla for two years but once. He was sure lucky that time, though, for he brought back his "better half." He now spends his time in trying to penetrate the domes of some of the Sophomore Chemists.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Fish" hasn't left Rolla for two years but once. He was sure lucky that time, though, for he brought back his "better half." He now spends his time in trying to penetrate the domes of some of the Sophomore Chemists.

name: Forman, Percy G.
description: Percy is another one of those whom fate has led astray. Is also one of those quiet, unobtrusive fellows who is always ready to shoulder his share of the work and is sure to do it to the best of his ability. Can be seen most any time of the day carrying home groceries or getting in wood.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Percy is another one of those whom fate has led astray. Is also one of those quiet, unobtrusive fellows who is always ready to shoulder his share of the work and is sure to do it to the best of his ability. Can be seen most any time of the day carrying home groceries or getting in wood.

name: Guy, Earl McKinley
description: One of the shortcomings of Davenport. Caruso of the Country Club. Usually seen looking for something that he has lost.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: One of the shortcomings of Davenport. Caruso of the Country Club. Usually seen looking for something that he has lost.

name: Hahn, Abner Decker
description: Hahn became a member of the Benedicts of M. S. M. before he was half through school. Is a frequent visitor to the library and picture show with his better half as company. Was quite a gun in the S. A. T. C.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Hahn became a member of the Benedicts of M. S. M. before he was half through school. Is a frequent visitor to the library and picture show with his better half as company. Was quite a gun in the S. A. T. C.

name: Hammer, Bernard Ely
description: A burner of the midnight oil for more than one reason. Ben likes to travel, but doesn't believe in railroad fares. May be found at H. & S. when the high six is not in session.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: A burner of the midnight oil for more than one reason. Ben likes to travel, but doesn't believe in railroad fares. May be found at H. & S. when the high six is not in session.

name: Hoke, William F.
description: This handsome gentleman came from Drury to this place in order to become an engineer. Can always be found at the dances and is a very popular man among both sexes. He who loves not the women, wine and song had might as well be dead all his life long.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: This handsome gentleman came from Drury to this place in order to become an engineer. Can always be found at the dances and is a very popular man among both sexes. He who loves not the women, wine and song had might as well be dead all his life long.

name: Hollingshead, Homer A.
description: Formerly of Hannibal, but grew ashamed to admit it so he claims St. Joseph now. Is reported to have made regular trips to St. Louis and then stopped suddenly. Is trying to re-establish his fame as a pugilist.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Formerly of Hannibal, but grew ashamed to admit it so he claims St. Joseph now. Is reported to have made regular trips to St. Louis and then stopped suddenly. Is trying to re-establish his fame as a pugilist.

name: Huffman, Daniel E. Jr.
description: Is a Mining Engineer and has been of great assistance to the Physics Department in his investigations of the electrical fields in the bottom of the Frisco Pond. His chief pride is the little growth which he has so faithfully nurtured on his upper lip. Is going to China when he learns all there is to be learned here.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Is a Mining Engineer and has been of great assistance to the Physics Department in his investigations of the electrical fields in the bottom of the Frisco Pond. His chief pride is the little growth which he has so faithfully nurtured on his upper lip. Is going to China when he learns all there is to be learned here.

name: Hughes, Harry H. Jr.
description: Hasn't anything against studying but just hasn't the time for it. Takes particular delight in smokers and has been known to make several trips to the Fair Grounds. Has some hopes of becoming a Mine Engineer.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Hasn't anything against studying but just hasn't the time for it. Takes particular delight in smokers and has been known to make several trips to the Fair Grounds. Has some hopes of becoming a Mine Engineer.

name: Hurst, Henry W.
description: "Hank" hails from K. C., but claims good old U. S. A. as his home. One of the few remaining members of the "Old School." For character reference, see Bailey or Davidson.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Hank" hails from K. C., but claims good old U. S. A. as his home. One of the few remaining members of the "Old School." For character reference, see Bailey or Davidson.

name: Illidge, Robert E.
description: Speaks Chinese. Readily gained his greatest reputation as a fusser. Made the fatal leap and is now a "life-termer." The man who originated the laugh and brought it to its highest degree of development.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Speaks Chinese. Readily gained his greatest reputation as a fusser. Made the fatal leap and is now a "life-termer." The man who originated the laugh and brought it to its highest degree of development.

name: Johnson, Richard L.
description: Johnson is known to everybody as Dick and also knows everyone in Rolla. Always keeps an eagle eye on his suitcase when returning to Rolla. He must have killed a deer out of season as he is always getting letters from the Game Department. Forgets that the K. Z. house is his home when a certain girl is in town.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Johnson is known to everybody as Dick and also knows everyone in Rolla. Always keeps an eagle eye on his suitcase when returning to Rolla. He must have killed a deer out of season as he is always getting letters from the Game Department. Forgets that the K. Z. house is his home when a certain girl is in town.

name: Keeler, W. W.
description: Known to his friends as Pb. O. Never known to move faster than a walk. Reads the latest fiction and makes up a lot. Rolla's girls offer no attraction to Keeler. We wonder why?
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Known to his friends as Pb. O. Never known to move faster than a walk. Reads the latest fiction and makes up a lot. Rolla's girls offer no attraction to Keeler. We wonder why?

name: Keeter, Vernon I.
description: "Baldy" is the pride of Maysville. Spends his time reading meters and the popular magazines. Is working on a formula for growing hair on a billiard ball. Didn't come very far from being a mosquito.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Baldy" is the pride of Maysville. Spends his time reading meters and the popular magazines. Is working on a formula for growing hair on a billiard ball. Didn't come very far from being a mosquito.

name: Kerr, Homer Chalmers
description: Kerr is also a home-grown product and can be located at Scott's Drug Store or on Salem Avenue. When he fails in his Mine Engineering we suspect that he will lecture on "The Art of Love-making." He is proficient in this line, and many recommendations can be had upon application.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Kerr is also a home-grown product and can be located at Scott's Drug Store or on Salem Avenue. When he fails in his Mine Engineering we suspect that he will lecture on "The Art of Love-making." He is proficient in this line, and many recommendations can be had upon application.

name: Laun, Albert Charles
description: "Fat" is from St. James but says that he can't help it.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Fat" is from St. James but says that he can't help it.

name: Lawrence, Hiram Pettibone
description: "Hi" is an Easterner who fell for one of our Rolla girls. Now a Vocate, and spends his time assaying and rolling the bones at the H. & S.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Hi" is an Easterner who fell for one of our Rolla girls. Now a Vocate, and spends his time assaying and rolling the bones at the H. & S.

name: Lepper, Lewis E. W.
description: Lepper attended Colgate in 1912 and in 1913 made his letter here in Football. And now is back with us again as a Vocational Man, with the Miner pep.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Lepper attended Colgate in 1912 and in 1913 made his letter here in Football. And now is back with us again as a Vocational Man, with the Miner pep.

name: Lumpkin, Lloyd Earl
description: The boy with the long-flowing locks. Spends most of his time debating with BeDell as to whether Jeff City or St. Louis is the more corrupt. generally wins on Jeff City.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: The boy with the long-flowing locks. Spends most of his time debating with BeDell as to whether Jeff City or St. Louis is the more corrupt. generally wins on Jeff City.

name: Ma, Heng Yung
clubs: American Institute of Mining and Metallurgical Engineers
description: Ma also comes to us from the Eastern Continent. He is a great believer in Frame's course in E. E. and H. & S. Pool Hall. He is also chief critic on the Junior Class Lyceum Course Committee.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Ma also comes to us from the Eastern Continent. He is a great believer in Frame's course in E. E. and H. & S. Pool Hall. He is also chief critic on the Junior Class Lyceum Course Committee.

name: Millar, Charles James
clubs: Student Assistant in Department of Special Research
description: "Liz" graduated at Christmas, but likes to study so well that he is still here. At present he is faithfully guarding the "Student's Health" with the able assistance of Dr. Shaw.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Liz" graduated at Christmas, but likes to study so well that he is still here. At present he is faithfully guarding the "Student's Health" with the able assistance of Dr. Shaw.

name: Miller, Edwin Lawrence Jr.
description: "Schnutze" left us in December after an interrupted college career dating back to 1914. Was a gun in Descriptive. Joined the ranks of the benedicts shortly before leaving school, thus gaining extra credit in "fussing" laboratory.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Schnutze" left us in December after an interrupted college career dating back to 1914. Was a gun in Descriptive. Joined the ranks of the benedicts shortly before leaving school, thus gaining extra credit in "fussing" laboratory.

name: Mize, Charles R.
description: Started his quest for knowledge in 1912, left school in 1913 and did not return until he had distinguished himself in the World War. He returned in 1919 and completed his course at Christmas. Upon graduation he joined the Field Artillery and is working for Uncle Sam again.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Started his quest for knowledge in 1912, left school in 1913 and did not return until he had distinguished himself in the World War. He returned in 1919 and completed his course at Christmas. Upon graduation he joined the Field Artillery and is working for Uncle Sam again.

name: Herbert, W. Mundt
description: The man with the "Bill Hart" physiognomy. Quick on the draw and doesn't miss. One of the few men who haven't made a mistake—as yet. "By the way, loan me a cigarette."
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: The man with the "Bill Hart" physiognomy. Quick on the draw and doesn't miss. One of the few men who haven't made a mistake—as yet. "By the way, loan me a cigarette."

name: Herman, Mutz
description: Mutz was some worker and surprised the Profs by getting out of school sooner than they had expected. Also surprised us by getting married as soon as he was out of school.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Mutz was some worker and surprised the Profs by getting out of school sooner than they had expected. Also surprised us by getting married as soon as he was out of school.

name: Albert, B. Needham
description: "Squeek" has done a little of everything since coming to Rolla, and now we hear that he is going to Oklahoma as Instructor in Calculus, Ore Dressing and Surveying. Has made the discovery that "The Moon is Beaming."
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Squeek" has done a little of everything since coming to Rolla, and now we hear that he is going to Oklahoma as Instructor in Calculus, Ore Dressing and Surveying. Has made the discovery that "The Moon is Beaming."

name: Netzeband, Wm. Ferdinand
description: Bill hails from St. Louis and won his letter in Mineralogy. Quiet and studious to the extreme. Never fussed much in Rolla, but was seen with one of the fair ones in the city. Always has been a willing worker in student activities. Just mention "Kris" to Bill and watch him blush.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Bill hails from St. Louis and won his letter in Mineralogy. Quiet and studious to the extreme. Never fussed much in Rolla, but was seen with one of the fair ones in the city. Always has been a willing worker in student activities. Just mention "Kris" to Bill and watch him blush.

name: Norville, Howard Oliver
description: "H. O." is one of the erring and another of our mid-year graduates. Liked Rolla so well he continued to stay after his graduation to edit the Miner and to assist H. & S. to rake in the students' extra "shekels." Has some hopes of becoming a Mine Engineer.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "H. O." is one of the erring and another of our mid-year graduates. Liked Rolla so well he continued to stay after his graduation to edit the Miner and to assist H. & S. to rake in the students' extra "shekels." Has some hopes of becoming a Mine Engineer.

name: Nudelman, Barney
description: Barney is now doing P. G. work, looking towards a position as assistant beaker boy. Would be a musician, but the necessity of impressing chemistry on the "Frosh" occupies too much of his time.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Barney is now doing P. G. work, looking towards a position as assistant beaker boy. Would be a musician, but the necessity of impressing chemistry on the "Frosh" occupies too much of his time.

name: Patterson, Harold Ford
description: Is one of Rolla's high-powered "fussers." Taking several correspondence courses now. Only man in school that ever outran Fred White. Prefers Buicks.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Is one of Rolla's high-powered "fussers." Taking several correspondence courses now. Only man in school that ever outran Fred White. Prefers Buicks.

name: Rohloff, Joseph H.
description: Is one of our star Basketball men and we are sorry that he is going to coach a rival team next year. He is another Missourian that has been corrupted by cash and is going to Oklahoma.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Is one of our star Basketball men and we are sorry that he is going to coach a rival team next year. He is another Missourian that has been corrupted by cash and is going to Oklahoma.

name: Salmon, Julius C., Jr.
description: Says he knows geology, but isn't going to put it out until he gets paid for it. Has burned the candle at both ends and has had good (?) results.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Says he knows geology, but isn't going to put it out until he gets paid for it. Has burned the candle at both ends and has had good (?) results.

name: Schumacher, Leon B.
description: "Schumi" is a typical St. Louis product. Does not seem to realize that he is in Rolla. Wonders why the Rolla girls want to kiss him when he takes them home from a dance. Well, you know he's good-looking and girls will be girls.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Schumi" is a typical St. Louis product. Does not seem to realize that he is in Rolla. Wonders why the Rolla girls want to kiss him when he takes them home from a dance. Well, you know he's good-looking and girls will be girls.

name: Shanfeld, Samuel N.
description: Very quiet and unassuming. Exceedingly modest in presence of ladies. Successfully concealed his baser instincts until his record was established as a student and then overnight blossomed into an unexcelled ladies' man.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Very quiet and unassuming. Exceedingly modest in presence of ladies. Successfully concealed his baser instincts until his record was established as a student and then overnight blossomed into an unexcelled ladies' man.

name: Shih, H. P.
description: "Mike" has the distinction of being one of the few foreign members of Tau Beta Pi. He received his degree as a Christmas present in 1921 and has gone forth to make his fortune. Also received his B. S. degree in pool lab. shortly after he came, but gave it up finally for the more ardent love for picture shows.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Mike" has the distinction of being one of the few foreign members of Tau Beta Pi. He received his degree as a Christmas present in 1921 and has gone forth to make his fortune. Also received his B. S. degree in pool lab. shortly after he came, but gave it up finally for the more ardent love for picture shows.

name: Stewart, William Lincoln
major: Mine Engineering Class 1921, SCHOOL OF MISSOURI MINES
description: Although he is one of the guns of the class, he doesn't allow his studies to interfere with his college education. Has plenty of school spirit and pep and is a loyal supporter of all school activities. When not fussing he spends his time at school.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Although he is one of the guns of the class, he doesn't allow his studies to interfere with his college education. Has plenty of school spirit and pep and is a loyal supporter of all school activities. When not fussing he spends his time at school.

name: Stroup, Robert Knox
major: Mine Engineering Class 1920, SCHOOL OF MISSOURI MINES
description: He is so called because he can argue religion and politics by the hour. His exact religion is unknown, but it is thought that he is inclined towards Mormonism. He made his social splash this year, but since then he has not bothered the "400" any. He also gained some renown as a baggage smasher. A jolly good fellow after all is said.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: He is so called because he can argue religion and politics by the hour. His exact religion is unknown, but it is thought that he is inclined towards Mormonism. He made his social splash this year, but since then he has not bothered the "400" any. He also gained some renown as a baggage smasher. A jolly good fellow after all is said.

name: Stroup, Richard John
major: Mine Engineering Class 1918, SCHOOL OF MISSOURI MINES
description: Stroup is known more generally as the "Gob," due to his peculiar walk acquired while in the Navy. Occasionally seen at the School of Mines caring for the Mine Surveyors. Never known to fuss in Rolla.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Stroup is known more generally as the "Gob," due to his peculiar walk acquired while in the Navy. Occasionally seen at the School of Mines caring for the Mine Surveyors. Never known to fuss in Rolla.

name: Huston, Taylor
description: Better known as "Porky." A real politician and sooner or later gets things his way. Can borrow seventeen hundred dollars on a dime. Imports his friends from Lebanon and shows unusually good taste. Is not so very large, but then you know what comes in small packages.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Better known as "Porky." A real politician and sooner or later gets things his way. Can borrow seventeen hundred dollars on a dime. Imports his friends from Lebanon and shows unusually good taste. Is not so very large, but then you know what comes in small packages.

name: Valentine, H. F.
description: Valentine spent several years working for Uncle Sam and as a reward for his services he has been given Vocational Training. He worked a miracle in producing 60 beads which he had obtained when here at a former date. He parted and weighed these, checking all but three.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Valentine spent several years working for Uncle Sam and as a reward for his services he has been given Vocational Training. He worked a miracle in producing 60 beads which he had obtained when here at a former date. He parted and weighed these, checking all but three.

name: Wallace, Milton W.
description: "Milt" is a true son of the East; came west to inhale Western Brand of Knowledge. He can always be found playing pinochle when not studying E. E. Was once known to fuss one of the fair sex in Rolla.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Milt" is a true son of the East; came west to inhale Western Brand of Knowledge. He can always be found playing pinochle when not studying E. E. Was once known to fuss one of the fair sex in Rolla.

name: White, Fred Pope
description: "Nubian" would not be happy unless he could start a rough house every day. Is very unhappy if he does not receive his yellow letter from Lindenwood daily. We wonder if she knows him as well as we do. A fast man on the track.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Nubian" would not be happy unless he could start a rough house every day. Is very unhappy if he does not receive his yellow letter from Lindenwood daily. We wonder if she knows him as well as we do. A fast man on the track.

name: Williams, Anvil Clark
description: Clark is a demon for work and is one of the real guns of the school. Seldom fails to knock the Professors off in their quizzes. Takes particular interest in Masonry Design. Though unknown to most of us, he has an extra credit in "fussing lab."
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Clark is a demon for work and is one of the real guns of the school. Seldom fails to knock the Professors off in their quizzes. Takes particular interest in Masonry Design. Though unknown to most of us, he has an extra credit in "fussing lab."

name: Wilson, James Mortimer
clubs: Member of the "Every Night Letter Club"
description: "Kiss Me" has his reputation as a Tea Hound to uphold. Well known in Hannibal dress suit circles. Favorite song, "All the World Will Be Jealous of Me."
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Kiss Me" has his reputation as a Tea Hound to uphold. Well known in Hannibal dress suit circles. Favorite song, "All the World Will Be Jealous of Me."

name: Wilson, Joseph Martland
description: "Joe" is known for his ability as an artist. Has invented a leather vest to wear at the dances. Can be found at any time in the Library. Believes in Volstead's Hypothesis.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Joe" is known for his ability as an artist. Has invented a leather vest to wear at the dances. Can be found at any time in the Library. Believes in Volstead's Hypothesis.
